info.title: BinlogInsights - MSBuild binary log analysis tool

commands.name: compare
commands.description: Compare two binlogs side-by-side (properties, imports, references)

commands.name: errors
commands.description: List build errors with project/target/task context

commands.name: imports
commands.description: Show project import tree (Directory.Build.props, SDK imports, etc.)

commands.name: items
commands.description: Show MSBuild items (Compile, PackageReference, etc.) for a project

commands.name: nuget
commands.description: NuGet restore diagnostics (packages, restore status, errors)

commands.name: overview
commands.description: Build overview (success, duration, projects, error/warning counts)

commands.name: preprocess
commands.description: Show effective project XML with embedded source files

commands.name: projects
commands.description: List all project files involved in the build

commands.name: properties
commands.description: Show evaluated MSBuild properties for a project

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search all build messages by text

options.name: --offset
options.description:
Skip first n results (default: 0)
Command-specific options:
warnings:   --code <code>          Filter by warning code (e.g. CS0618)
properties: --filter <name1,name2>  Filter by property names
items:      --type <itemType>       Item type (e.g. Compile, PackageReference)
preprocess: --max-length <n>        Max output chars (default: 30000)
search:     --query <text>          Search text (required)
compare:    <binlogA> <binlogB>    Two binlog files to compare
